changes.description: Initial empty release shell for Gene-Disease Evidence Index.
Promoted candidate package candidate:opentargets-parkinson-dev into release parkinson-v0.1.0.

changes.description: Promoted candidate package candidate:clinvar-parkinson-dev into release parkinson-v0.1.0.
warnings: Promotion plan is a dry run and does not modify release artifacts.

changes.description: First Parkinson disease (MONDO:0005180) public-candidate export: 6 seed genes (SNCA, LRRK2, PRKN, PINK1, PARK7, GBA1) with Open Targets association signals and ClinVar gene-condition context in the clean single-MONDO source_record_id format. Built by applying the reviewed Parkinson Open Targets and ClinVar candidates to a Parkinson-scoped release shell.
